PreToolUse.command: node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8');const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(p.includes('.env')&&!p.includes('.example')){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: Do not write to .env files — use .env.local.example for templates');process.exit(2)}console.log(d)"

PostToolUse.command: node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8');const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';const ext=p.split('.').pop();if(['ts','tsx'].includes(ext)&&p.includes('apps/web')){console.log('[Hook] TypeScript file modified: '+p);console.log('[Hook] Run npx next build to verify no type errors before commit')}else{console.log(d)}" 2>/dev/null || true
PostToolUse.description: Remind to verify build after TypeScript edits
